hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'frontend/.*\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md)$'; then (cd frontend && npx --no-install prettier --write "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH") >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi
echo 'See docs/developments/ for architecture / testing / coding-rules / ubiquitous-language / claude-code-usage.'
